news.headline: Rajasthan Issues Guidelines for Battery Storage Integration with Renewables
news.summary: Listen to this article The Rajasthan Rajya Vidyut Prasaran Nigam (RRVPNL) has issued a standard operating procedure (SOP) for the first time charging of battery

news.headline: PFC Consulting Tenders Interstate Transmission Project in Maharashtra
news.summary: PFC Consulting has issued a tender to select a transmission service provider to develop an interstate transmission system (ISTS) for a network expansion project.

news.headline: NEEPCO Issues Tender for Rooftop Solar Projects Across Northeast States
news.summary: Listen to this article The North Eastern Electric Power Corporation (NEEPCO) has invited bids from empaneled channel partners to set up grid-connected rooftop solar systems

news.headline: Solar Cell Capacity Under ALMM List-II Nears 30 GW
news.summary: The Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE) has expanded the Approved List of Models and Manufacturers (ALMM) List-II for solar cells in its seventh revision. RenewSys India has entered the ALMM List-II with 452 MW of bifacial N-Type TOPCon solar cells at its manufacturing facility in the Ran

news.headline: Punjab to Procure Firm, Dispatchable Renewable Energy from NHPC
news.summary: The Punjab State Electricity Regulatory Commission (PSERC) approved the long-term procurement of firm, dispatchable renewable energy by the Punjab State Power Corporation from NHPC for a period of 25 years.

news.headline: Gujarat Floats Tender to Procure Power from 250 MW Wind Projects
news.summary: Gujarat Urja Vikas Nigam (GUVNL) has invited bids to procure power from 250 MW of grid-connected wind projects.

news.headline: GRIDCO Floats Consultancy Tender for 225 MW Floating Solar Project
news.summary: Listen to this article The Grid Corporation of Odisha (GRIDCO) has invited bids to select a consultant to conduct an environmental and social impact assessment

news.headline: Drop in Module Shipments Pushes Jinko Solar’s Q1 Revenue Down 11.5% YoY
news.summary: China-based solar cell and module manufacturer JinkoSolar posted a revenue of RMB12.25 billion (~$1.78 billion) in the first quarter (Q1) of 2026, down 11.5% year-over-year (YoY) from RMB13.84 billion (~$2 billion).

news.headline: Leading Solar Tracker Suppliers in India in 2025
news.summary: Listen to this article India is seeing an increased adoption of solar tracking systems, particularly in utility-scale projects, to maximize energy generation. By improving energy yield without additional land, trackers

news.headline: Weather, Financing Challenges Weigh on Enphase’s Weak Start to 2026
news.summary: Listen to this article Microinverter and battery storage supplier Enphase Energy reported revenue of $282.9 million in the first quarter (Q1) of 2026, decreasing 20.6% year-over-year (YoY)
